demo.title: agenticbets.sh
demo.code:
# List open prediction markets
scripts/agenticbets.py list open

# Check odds on a market
scripts/agenticbets.py odds AGBETS

# Place a $5 UP bet on AGBETS
scripts/agenticbets.py bet AGBETS up 5

# Claim winnings from a settled round
scripts/agenticbets.py claim AGBETS 42

setup: Login: `bankr login email you@example.com` — generate a read-write API key
Fund your Bankr wallet with USDC on Base: `bankr wallet portfolio`
Run: `scripts/agenticbets.py list` to see open markets
